calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Assets Are Trust Assets
Off Calendar Jun-27-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Henry Veit appearing for and with petitioner Glenn Lerner. The petitioner had orally included the three assets in the trust but they are not listed on Schedule A. Court questions the value of the assets and when they were acquired. Matter granted. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

Petition For Order Confirming Assets Are Trust Assets
Off Calendar Jun-13-2006 Continued To Jun-27-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
